title: manulea incana
intro: Manulea incana, also known as the Grey Manulea or Mountain Manulea, is a plant species native to South Africa, belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Manulea incana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
